CMD_BENCH_START.description: Start a benchmark test on the MCU.

test_id.description: Test ID to run (see CMD_BENCH_LIST_TESTS for available tests)

budget_us.description: Max time budget per iteration in microseconds (0 = unlimited)

CMD_BENCH_STOP.description: Cancel all running and queued benchmarks.

active_test.description: Currently running test ID (0 if none)

max.description: Maximum number of results to return

CMD_PERF_RESET.description: Reset MCU performance counters and statistics.

CMD_CAM_GET_STATUS.description: Get camera device status (IP, RSSI, heap, uptime).

CMD_CAM_SET_QUALITY.description: Set JPEG compression quality. Lower values = better quality, larger files.

state.description: Flash state: on, off, or toggle.

CMD_CAM_APPLY_PRESET.description: Apply a predefined camera configuration preset.

CMD_CAM_START_CAPTURE.description: Start continuous frame capture (polling or streaming mode).

CMD_CTRL_SIGNAL_DEFINE.description: Define a new signal in the signal bus. Only allowed when IDLE.

signal_kind.description: Signal kind: REF = reference/setpoint, MEAS = measurement/feedback, OUT = control output, EST = state estimate.

CMD_CTRL_SIGNALS_CLEAR.description: Clear all signals from the signal bus.

CMD_CTRL_SIGNAL_SET.description: Set a signal value in the signal bus.

CMD_CTRL_SIGNAL_GET.description: Get a signal value from the signal bus.

CMD_CTRL_SIGNALS_LIST.description: List all defined signals in the signal bus.

CMD_CTRL_SIGNAL_DELETE.description: Delete a signal from the signal bus.

CMD_CTRL_SIGNAL_TRACE.description: Subscribe to trace specific signals via telemetry at a configurable rate.

signal_ids.description: List of signal IDs to trace (max 16). Empty array disables tracing.

CMD_CTRL_AUTO_SIGNALS_CONFIG.description: Configure auto-signal publishing from hardware managers (IMU, encoders, etc). Requires ARMED state.

imu.description: IMU auto-signal config: {enabled: bool, rate_hz: int}

encoder.description: Encoder auto-signal config: {enabled: bool, rate_hz: int}

CMD_CTRL_SLOT_CONFIG.description: Configure a control slot with controller type and signal routing. Only allowed when IDLE.

out_id.description: Signal ID for control output (PID mode).

state_ids.description: Signal IDs for state measurements (STATE_SPACE mode).

ref_ids.description: Signal IDs for state references (STATE_SPACE mode).

output_ids.description: Signal IDs for control outputs (STATE_SPACE mode).

require_armed.description: Only run when robot is armed.

require_active.description: Only run when robot is active.

CMD_CTRL_SLOT_ENABLE.description: Enable or disable a configured control slot.

enable.description: True to enable, False to disable.

CMD_CTRL_SLOT_GET_PARAM.description: Get a scalar parameter from a control slot's controller.

key.description: Parameter name (e.g., 'kp', 'ki', 'kd' for PID; 'k00', 'ki0' for STATE_SPACE).

CMD_CTRL_SLOT_RESET.description: Reset a control slot's internal state (integrators, etc).

CMD_CTRL_SLOT_SET_PARAM.description: Set a scalar parameter on a control slot's controller.

key.description: Parameter name (e.g., 'kp', 'ki', 'kd', 'out_min', 'out_max' for PID; 'k00', 'ki0', 'u0_min' for STATE_SPACE).

CMD_CTRL_SLOT_SET_PARAM_ARRAY.description: Set an array parameter on a control slot (e.g., gain matrix K for state-space).

key.description: Parameter name ('K' = state feedback, 'Kr' = reference feedforward, 'Ki' = integral gains).

values.description: Array of float values. For K/Kr: row-major order [k00,k01,...,k10,k11,...]. For Ki: one per output.

CMD_CTRL_SLOT_STATUS.description: Get status of a control slot.

CMD_CTRL_GRAPH_UPLOAD.description: Upload a runtime control-graph config. Use commit=false for two-phase commit (requires CMD_CTRL_GRAPH_COMMIT to activate).

graph.description: Normalized control-graph config with schema_version and slots.

commit.description: If true (default), immediately activate. If false, stage as pending and return token for later commit.

mode.description: Upload mode: 'replace' clears all and uploads new (default), 'merge' preserves runtime state for unchanged slots.

CMD_CTRL_GRAPH_CLEAR.description: Clear the stored runtime control-graph config.

CMD_CTRL_GRAPH_ENABLE.description: Enable or disable all stored control-graph slots.

enable.description: True to enable all slots, false to disable all slots.

CMD_CTRL_GRAPH_STATUS.description: Get status of the stored runtime control graph.

CMD_CTRL_GRAPH_DEBUG.description: Enable debug streaming for a single slot to see intermediate transform values. Only one slot can be in debug mode at a time.

slot_id.description: Slot ID to enable debug for, or empty string to disable debug mode.

CMD_CTRL_GRAPH_COMMIT.description: Commit a pending control graph upload. Use with CMD_CTRL_GRAPH_UPLOAD commit=false for two-phase commit.

token.description: Token returned from the pending upload to confirm.

CMD_MCU_DIAGNOSTICS_QUERY.description: Query persisted MCU diagnostics and mirrored persistence metadata.

CMD_MCU_DIAGNOSTICS_RESET.description: Reset persisted MCU diagnostics counters while preserving boot identity fields.

CMD_DC_VEL_PID_ENABLE.description: Enable or disable closed-loop velocity PID control for a DC motor.

enable.description: True to enable velocity PID, False to disable

CMD_DC_SET_VEL_TARGET.description: Set velocity target for a DC motor's PID controller.

CMD_DC_SET_VEL_GAINS.description: Configure PID gains for DC motor velocity control.

CMD_GPIO_WRITE.description: Set GPIO pin high or low.

CMD_GPIO_REGISTER_CHANNEL.description: Register a GPIO channel mapping a logical ID to a physical pin.

CMD_PWM_SET.description: Set PWM duty cycle on a channel.

CMD_SET_MODE.description: Set the high-level robot mode. Prefer ARM/ACTIVATE/DISARM/DEACTIVATE.

CMD_SET_VEL.description: Set linear and angular velocity in robot frame.

estimate_ids.description: Signal IDs where state estimates (x̂) are written.

CMD_OBSERVER_ENABLE.description: Enable or disable a configured observer.

CMD_OBSERVER_RESET.description: Reset observer state estimate to zero.

CMD_OBSERVER_SET_PARAM_ARRAY.description: Set full matrix (A, B, C, or L) in row-major order.

CMD_OBSERVER_STATUS.description: Get observer status and current state estimates.

CMD_GET_RATES.description: Get current loop rates (ctrl, safety, telem) in Hz.

CMD_CTRL_SET_RATE.description: Set control loop rate in Hz. Only allowed when IDLE.

CMD_SAFETY_SET_RATE.description: Set safety loop rate in Hz. Only allowed when IDLE.

CMD_TELEM_SET_RATE.description: Set telemetry loop rate in Hz. Only allowed when IDLE.

CMD_GET_IDENTITY.description: Get firmware version, board type, and feature flags.

CMD_HEARTBEAT.description: Host heartbeat to maintain connection. Resets host timeout watchdog.

CMD_ARM.description: Arm the robot for operation. Required before moving actuators.

CMD_DISARM.description: Disarm the robot. Stops all motion.

CMD_ACTIVATE.description: Activate the robot (ARMED -> ACTIVE). Motion commands are only accepted in ACTIVE state.

CMD_DEACTIVATE.description: Deactivate the robot (ACTIVE -> ARMED). Stops accepting motion commands.

CMD_ESTOP.description: Emergency stop - immediately halt all motion and enter ESTOP state. Requires clear_estop before resuming.

CMD_CLEAR_ESTOP.description: Clear emergency stop condition (ESTOP -> IDLE). Required after estop before normal operation.

CMD_STOP.description: Soft stop - zero velocities without changing robot state.

CMD_GET_STATE.description: Query current robot state from MCU. Returns mode (IDLE/ARMED/ACTIVE/ESTOP), armed status, active status, and estop status.

mode.description: Current mode: IDLE, ARMED, ACTIVE, ESTOP

enabled.description: True if any timeout is active

CMD_SET_SAFETY_TIMEOUTS.description: Set safety timeout values. Use 0 to disable a timeout.

enabled.description: True if any timeout is active

CMD_SET_SIGNING_KEY.description: Set the signing key for state transition authentication. First key allowed unconditionally. Key rotation requires current key signature.

signature.description: Signature of new key using current key (required for rotation)

key_set.description: True if key was set successfully

CMD_RELEASE_SESSION.description: Release session ownership to allow another host to take control.

CMD_IMU_READ.description: Read IMU sensor data (accelerometer and gyroscope).

CMD_IMU_CALIBRATE.description: Auto-calibrate IMU bias by collecting samples.

CMD_I2C_SCAN.description: Scan the MCU primary I2C bus and report responding addresses.

CMD_ULTRASONIC_ATTACH.description: Attach an ultrasonic distance sensor to GPIO pins.

CMD_ULTRASONIC_READ.description: Read distance from ultrasonic sensor in centimeters.

CMD_ENCODER_ATTACH.description: Attach a quadrature encoder to GPIO pins.

CMD_SERVO_ATTACH.description: Attach a servo to a GPIO pin.

CMD_SERVO_DETACH.description: Detach a servo from its pin.

CMD_SERVO_SET_ANGLE.description: Move a servo to the specified angle.

CMD_SERVO_SET_PULSE.description: Set servo pulse width directly in microseconds.

CMD_BATCH_APPLY.description: Apply a generic staged batch/composite envelope using actions=[{cmd,args}, ...]. Batchable commands: CMD_GPIO_WRITE, CMD_SERVO_SET_ANGLE, CMD_PWM_SET, CMD_DC_SET_SPEED, CMD_DC_STOP, CMD_STEPPER_MOVE_REL, CMD_STEPPER_STOP. MCU apply order is fixed by command family on one control tick.

actions.description: Array of batch action objects shaped like {cmd, args}.

CMD_STEPPER_ENABLE.description: Enable or disable a stepper driver (energize coils).

enable.description: True to enable, False to disable

CMD_STEPPER_MOVE_REL.description: Move stepper motor by relative steps.

CMD_STEPPER_GET_POSITION.description: Get the current position of a stepper motor in steps.

CMD_STEPPER_RESET_POSITION.description: Reset the stepper position counter to zero.

CMD_TELEM_SET_INTERVAL.description: Set telemetry publish interval in milliseconds (0 = disable).

CMD_SET_LOG_LEVEL.description: Set MCU global logging verbosity level.

CMD_SET_SUBSYSTEM_LOG_LEVEL.description: Set logging verbosity for a specific MCU subsystem (e.g., servo, stepper, motor).

level.description: Log level. 'off' reverts to global level.

CMD_GET_LOG_LEVELS.description: Get current MCU log levels (global and per-subsystem).

CMD_CLEAR_SUBSYSTEM_LOG_LEVELS.description: Clear all per-subsystem log levels, reverting to global level.

connected.description: True if connected to a network
